name: Bluet EcoLight Floating Platform
intendedUse: Private saunas, swimming platforms, small docks, residential leisure
description: A lightweight, modular floating platform made from recycled HDPE. Designed for protected coastal areas, archipelago bays, and calm inland waters.

constraints.iceResistance: Low: must be removed or stored ashore for winter (October–April in Finland)

name: Bluet HD Commercial Pontoon
intendedUse: Floating pools, commercial saunas, waterfront restaurants, event terraces, small hotels
description: A heavy-duty galvanized steel pontoon system for commercial-grade floating structures in moderate open-water conditions. Suitable for Finnish archipelago and protected coastal bays.

constraints.iceResistance: Moderate: seasonal dismantling recommended; can withstand light ice (<10cm) with protective mooring

name: Bluet Arctic Heavy-Duty System
intendedUse: Floating hotels, marine research stations, large public pools, floating urban infrastructure, exposed coastal locations
description: Bluet's most robust solution, engineered specifically for harsh Nordic marine environments. Uses a reinforced steel–concrete composite hull with integrated ice deflectors. Designed for year-round Baltic Sea operation.

constraints.iceResistance: High: reinforced steel/concrete composite hull with active ice deflectors; rated for 30cm ice sheets

features: Full utility integration (heating, water, power, sewage)
